data.body: [operator-attested] LANDED THROUGH GERRIT (2026-07-18). Gerrit change #805 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/805) is MERGED to main. Votes: LLM-Review +1 (approved) AND Verified +1 (CI: build/test/lint/typecheck green on GitHub Actions). Merge commit: d08f348474a775e67a0fed15d218bdf042251ad7; submitted 2026-07-18 23:27:48 UTC. Commit 540defbf1 carried the rebar-ticket: 59b7 trailer + DCO sign-off (joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com) + Change-Id I576dbbea0da9096c64f46e3a73fcc4f13cc3ac20. Pre-flight (repo-venv build): make lint PASS, make typecheck PASS (mypy: no issues in 340 files), targeted unit tests PASS; full make test green under CI Verified +1. BOUNDED SANITY RESULT (docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/asserted_capability_sanity.json, 6 live single-criterion runs via 'rebar criteria eval asserted-capability', NOT an E2/E3 batch): recall 1.0 — the probe FIRES on all 3 E1-verified misses dc58/db7b/5886 (stability 1.0 each), exceeding the report §6 R1 >=2/3 gate; clean controls: 2/3 correct no-fire (N2 grounded-true reuse, N3 external-fact abstain), and 1 ADVISORY false-fire on N1 (a no-capability-claim control) recorded as the first advisory->blocking promotion-gate dogfood datapoint (posture is advisory, so it never blocks). Criterion auto-flows into criterion_effectiveness.py --report with zero per-criterion wiring (unit-tested). Registration clean: validate_packaged_routing()==[] and validate_criteria_guide()==[] (no ORPHAN).
